problem id: 3a148f6a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  00100011 -> 00101000
  10100000 -> 11101111
  10011000 -> 10000011
  11001010 -> 00001111
  00111000 -> 10010011
  01001011 -> 11001100
  10000111 -> 00110011
  00110001 -> 00000101
  00000100 -> 11110101
  01111101 -> 10111011

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 00100111
